name: Batter-Dipped Fondue Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Salad Oil (Do NOT Use Margarine)
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: You can omit the butter and increase the salad oil to 2 1/2 cups.
Mix the meat, egg, bread crumbs, beer, and garlic salt. Shape the mixture into 3/4-inch balls.
Prepare the frothy batter by mixing all ingredients with a fork (the batter will be slightly lumpy).
Heat the oil and butter in a metal fondue pot to 375 degrees F.
Spear the meatballs with a fondue fork and dip into the batter. Cook in the hot oil for about 2 minutes until desired doneness.
Serve with both sauces. NOTE: The meatballs can also be cooked without the batter.
